subcodes.first_line: The dawn of Divine Utterance hath broken, and the Tongue of the All-Merciful speaketh forth in this mighty prison, making mention of His loved ones who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد طلع فجر البیان و لسان الرحمن ینطق فی هذا السجن العظیم و یذکر احبائه الذین
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @high station of the true believer, @differences in human capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @thankfulness; gratitude, @suffering and imprisonment
